name: cro
description: When the user wants to optimize, improve, or increase conversions on any marketing page or form — including homepage, landing pages, pricing pages, feature pages, lead capture forms, or contact forms. Also use when the user says 'CRO,' 'conversion rate optimization,' 'this page isn't converting,' 'improve conversions,' 'why isn't this page working,' 'my landing page sucks,' 'form abandonment,' 'nobody's converting,' 'low conversion rate,' or 'this page needs work.' Use this even if the user just
author: coreyhaines31
summary_zh: 这是一款营销转化率优化助手，专门帮你诊断和提升各类页面与表单的转化效果，适合遇到落地页没效果、表单流失或想提高转化率时使用。
